title: Verify Engagement section shows personalized content based on consumption level
description: Test that Engagement section displays acquired content before 90% consumption and similar genre recommendations after 90%
preconditions: User has some content in library

steps.description: 2. Check Engagement section with consumption below 90%

expected_result: Below 90%: Shows acquired content library. At 90%+: Shows top 1 content in similar genre of acquired content with auto-play trailer
